title: jj Skill — Op-Log Recovery Rule (Design)
summary: Adopts recovery ladder and MUST NOT gate for jj op restore/abandon commands to prevent multi-workspace op-log hazards.
notes: Unconventional path (docs/plans/ not adr/) and filename convention (no ADR- prefix), but content structure is pure decision record: clear decision statement (Adopt Option B), grounded claims with citations, consequences table, acceptance criteria. Status field 'Approved (awaiting implementation plan)' treated as Accepted/locked. Bead-tracked (fzymgc-house-skills-5qh).
